end end return(function(P,G,i,J,N,Q,A,X,u,b,R,x,H,l,t,U,j,w,v,y,p,f,L)u,b,w,v,U,R,H,l,L,x,f,X,t,j,y,p=function(P)local I,f=428818-428817,P[-772863-(-772864)]while f do G(A)end,function(P,I)local G=p(I)local i=function(i,J,N,Q)return f(P,{i,J;N;Q},I,G)end return i end,142825+-142825,function(P,I)local G=p(I)local i=function(i,J,N)return f(P,{i,J;N},I,G)end return i end,function(P,I)local G=p(I)local i=function(i,J,N,Q,A,w)return f(P,{i,J,N;Q,A,w},I,G)end return i end,function(P)for I=1046639-1046638,#P,-979153-(-979154)do R[P[I]]=R[P[I]]+(919979+-919978)end if i then local f=i(true)local G=N(f)G[I(857390-882327)],G[I(533212+-558204)],G[I(278240+-303244)]=P,u,function()return-973144+122450 end return f else return J({},{[I(-208112-(-183120))]=u,[I(-638099-(-613162))]=P,[I(-765477+740473)]=function()return-472993+-377701 end})end end return(l(255286+5318858,{}))(G(A))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[I(937526+-962447)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
